function.message: I can’t safely complete this inbox request yet because the recipient and linkage are not canonically resolvable. The inbox asks for 'the oldest 3 invoices linked to the ops manager at the tax firm,' but no cast record explicitly identifies a tax-firm ops manager, and invoice records were not found with explicit related-entity linkage fields to determine which three are in scope. Please clarify which specific entity/email should receive the reply (and, if needed, which invoice subset defines 'linked').
function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read inbox-processing and email workflows, used canonical cast files for email identity, and stopped without mutation when recipient authority/linkage remained ambiguous.
function.outcome_justification: Canonical sender verification succeeded for miles@novak.example via 10_entities/cast/miles.md. However, candidate contacts (omar.md as ops_lead at dayjob.example; hanna.md as bureau_lead at bureau.example) do not explicitly satisfy 'ops manager at the tax firm.' Also, invoice linkage metadata was not found to select an exact 'oldest 3 linked' subset. Per AGENTS/workflow guidance, unresolved canonical destination/scope requires clarification rather than guessing.
